name: gweb
description: GWEB literate-programming support (.w, .ch): syntax highlighting, Go to Definition and Hover forwarded to your Go extension through gtangle's //line source map, section-name navigation, and tangle on save.

gweb.gtanglePath.description: Path to the gtangle executable (default: found on PATH).

gweb.tangleOnSave.description: Re-tangle a .w file on save when its tangled .go already exists, keeping Go to Definition and Hover accurate. (A web is never tangled for the first time behind your back; use the 'GWEB: Tangle current file' command for that.)
